description.ko: 지구 표면의 퇴적층과 광물 침전물이 만들어낸 정교하고 거친 지질학적 미학.
description.en: A detailed topographic view of Earth’s surface, showcasing the raw beauty of sedimentary layers and mineral deposits.

prompt: Hyper-realistic satellite photography of TERRA-1, titled 'The Lithospheric Pulse.' A top-down macro perspective of a river delta where #8B4513 sienna earth and #D2691E ochre sedimentary layers meet volcanic #2F4F4F slate mineral deposits. Sharp #F4A460 sand dunes create patterns like frozen lightning. Tactile texture showing every grain of sand and crystalline fracture. Cinematic natural lighting, 8k resolution, hyper-detailed geological mapping.
